title: Easy Baked Pork Tenderloin
ingredients: ½ tsp. coarsely ground black pepper
Take tenderloins out of refrigerator 30-45 minutes before cooking.
instructions: Mix all dry rub ingredients in small bowl. Pat tenderloins dry. Cover tenderloins with spice rub – can do right before baking or a couple of hours (refrigerator if over 45 minutes).

Place the tenderloins in a baking dish and top with butter pats. Bake, uncovered, for about 25 minutes or until pork has reached 145 degrees. Remove from oven and let rest of 10-15 minutes before slicing.
Slice into medallions, sprinkle with chopped parsley and serve.
